title: Stussy Betrays CP0
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Kaku, Unknown person #13, Sanji, Luffy, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15 as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I had my fill fighting critters...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ...with Zig- Zagging attacks back in Wano!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They're going to anninhilate the lab!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They sure know how to razzle- Dazzle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They're basically doing our job for us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who, me? I'm just putting him to sleep.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Clone of Miss Buckingham Stussy of the Rocks Pirates

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Would you please join him, Lucci?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think it's time for your cat nap too.

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 26 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
